metadata.regulatory_mandate: Factories Act Section 88 / OISD standards evidence preservation
metadata.description: Sealed SCADA telemetry and risk factors recording for safety investigation.

factors.name: Normal Operations (Active Permits)
factors.details: Active routine permits with all sensor parameters within normal green thresholds.

sensor_history.action_required: ROUTINE MONITORING - Standard operating procedures apply. No corrective action needed.

factors.name: CCTV: Unauthorized Zone Entry
factors.details: CCTV Alert: Unauthorized personnel detected in restricted zone 'Blast Furnace A' (85% confidence).

sensor_history.action_required: ROUTINE MONITORING - Standard operating procedures apply. No corrective action needed.

factors.name: CCTV: Unauthorized Zone Entry
factors.details: CCTV Alert: Unauthorized personnel detected in restricted zone 'Blast Furnace A' (85% confidence).

factors.name: Near Miss: Repeated Restricted Area Entry
factors.details: NEAR MISS PREDICTION: Worker repeatedly entering restricted area 'Blast Furnace A' by worker Anil (2 entries logged). Current shift telemetry is nominal, but system predicts a High Probability of incident within the next shift if patterns continue.

sensor_history.action_required: INCREASE SURVEILLANCE & RE-AUDIT PERMITS - Active anomalies detected. Safety supervisor must inspect site, verify gas ventilation, and review SIMOPs guidelines.

factors.name: Active Maintenance Activity
factors.details: Zone is undergoing active equipment maintenance. Transient conditions and bypassed safety systems may exist.

factors.name: Shift Changeover Risk
factors.details: Shift changeover in progress. Historical data shows heighted risk due to handoff communication gaps. Critical: Handover is occurring during active equipment maintenance.

factors.details: TOXIC GAS ALARM: Carbon Monoxide level is 55.0 ppm (OSHA PEL: 50 ppm, OISD-137 limits exceeded).
